name: Amethyst
desc: A purple crystal known for promoting calmness, spiritual awareness, and emotional balance. Often used for stress relief and meditation.

name: Rose Quartz
desc: A soft pink stone associated with unconditional love and emotional healing. Commonly used to strengthen relationships and self-love.

name: Black Tourmaline
desc: A powerful grounding stone believed to protect against negative energy and electromagnetic interference.

name: Citrine
desc: A bright yellow crystal associated with prosperity, confidence, and positive energy.

name: Selenite
desc: A translucent crystal believed to cleanse energy and promote mental clarity and peace.
